problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Atomic. Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
